title: Avoid duplicate characters in character classes of regular expressions
description: Duplicate characters in a character class of regular expressions are either a simple oversight or a sign that a range in the character class matches more than is intended or that the author misunderstood how character classes work.
recommendation: Avoid using the same character twice in a character class.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities or incorrect matching.

checks.message: Avoid using the same character twice in a character class.
